pages.caption: High above the frozen trenches, the air is perfectly climate-controlled.
The District Managers gather to celebrate the quarterly metrics.
The Algorithm's clerics observe quietly. They do not drink. They only calculate.
The toast of the 'Distilled Undeliverables.' The liquefied life essence of crushed route evaluations.
The ritual completes. A thousand carrier evaluations are sacrificed to sustain their immortality.
